commands.review_summary:
The PR changes agent tool prep to use config-only runtime snapshots, applies global tool policy earlier for optional media factories, memoizes session-list thinking enrichment, skips unused lightweight cost fallback checks, and adds tests plus changelog entries.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection on current main shows the hot paths the PR targets, and the linked issues provide concrete production reproduction shapes for tool-prep, PDF denial, and session-list latency. I did not run those production scenarios live in this read-only review.
